list.title: Client
list.description: constructor - Create a Kahoot! client.

list.title: Client#answer
list.description: Answer a question

list.title: Client#answerTwoFactorAuth
list.description: Answer the Two Factor Authentification

list.title: Client#data
list.description:
Extra client data.
Note: Some properties listed may not exist if the extraData module is disabled.

list.title: Client#defaults
list.description: The default settings for the client.

list.title: Client#defaults.modules
list.description: An object containing the modules to load or not load.

list.title: Client#defaults.options
list.description: A list of options used in Challenges

list.title: Client#defaults.proxy
list.description: A function to proxy kahoot.js-latests's http requests

list.title: Client#defaults.wsproxy
list.description: A function to proxy kahoot.js-latests's websocket requests

list.title: Client#event:Disconnect
list.description: Emitted when the client is disconnected. Emits a String with the reason the client was disconnected.

list.title: Client#event:Feedback
list.description: Emitted when the host requests for feedback

list.title: Client#event:GameReset
list.description: Emitted when the host presses "play again" or continues to the next quiz in the list.

list.title: Client#event:Joined
list.description: Emitted when the client joins the game

list.title: Client#event:NameAccept
list.description: Emitted when the server has validated the client's name

list.title: Client#event:Podium
list.description: Emitted at the end of the game (After "QuizEnd")

list.title: Client#event:QuestionEnd
list.description: An event emitted at the end of the question. Contains ranking information.

list.title: Client#event:QuestionReady
list.description: Emitted when the question is about to start

list.title: Client#event:QuestionStart
list.description: Emitted when the question starts

list.title: Client#event:QuizEnd
list.description: Emitted when the quiz ends.

list.title: Client#event:QuizStart
list.description: Emitted at the start of the quiz

list.title: Client#event:RecoveryData
list.description: Emitted when the server sends its recovery data.This event is mostly for debugging.

list.title: Client#event:TeamAccept
list.description: Emitted when the team members were accepted.

list.title: Client#event:TeamTalk
list.description: Emitted when team talk starts

list.title: Client#event:TimeOver
list.description: Emitted when time is over (before QuestionEnd)

list.title: Client#event:TwoFactorCorrect
list.description: TwoFactorCorrect Event. Emitted when the two-factor auth was answered correctly. Enables other events to start.

list.title: Client#event:TwoFactorReset
list.description: TwoFactorReset Event. Emitted when the two-factor auth resets and hasn't been answered correctly yet

list.title: Client#event:TwoFactorWrong
list.description: TwoFactorWrong Event. Emitted when the two-factor auth was answered incorrectly.

list.title: Client#handlers#connected
list.description: Whether the client is ready to receive eventsThis means that the client has joined the game

list.title: Client#join
list.description: Join a game. Also joins with team members.

list.title: Client#joinTeam
list.description: Send team members

list.title: Client#leave
list.description: leave - Leave the game.

list.title: Client#next
list.description: next - Go to the next part (challenge)

list.title: Client#quiz
list.description: The quiz object. May contain other information. See QuizStart event.

list.title: Client#quiz.currentQuestion
list.description: The question object. May contain other information than listed below. See question events.

list.title: Client#reconnect
list.description: reconnect to a game

list.title: Client#sendFeedback
list.description: Send feedback to the host

list.title: LiveEventTimetrack
list.description: An object about the time events were received

list.title: Nemesis
list.description: Information about a player one rank above the client.

list.title: PointsData
list.description: Information about the client's points.

list.title: StreakPoints
list.description: Detailed information about the client's answer streaks

list.title: client.requestRecoveryData - Request recovery information from the server
list.link: requestRecoveryData - Request recovery information from the server

list.title: module.exports#handlers.Disconnect
list.description: Disconnect - handles disconnection

list.title: module.exports#handlers.HandshakeChecker
list.description: HandshakeChecker - Handles the handshake to Kahoot!

list.title: module.exports#handlers.PingChecker
list.description: PingChecker - Handles the ping/pong messages

list.title: module.exports#handlers.QuestionReady
list.description: QuestionReady - Handles the QuestionReady event

list.title: module.exports#handlers.TwoFactor
list.description: TwoFactor - handles the 2FA events

list.title: module.exports#handlers.feedback
list.description: feedback - Handles the Feedback event

list.title: module.exports#handlers.gameReset
list.description: gameReset - Handles the GameReset event

list.title: module.exports#handlers.nameAccept
list.description: nameAccept - Handles the NameAccept event

list.title: module.exports#handlers.podium
list.description: podium - Handles the Podium event

list.title: module.exports#handlers.questionEnd
list.description: questionEnd - Handles the QuestionEnd event

list.title: module.exports#handlers.questionStart
list.description: questionStart - handles QuestionStart events

list.title: module.exports#handlers.quizEnd
list.description: quizEnd - Handles the QuizEnd event

list.title: module.exports#handlers.quizStart
list.description: quizStart - handles the quizStart event

list.title: module.exports#handlers.teamAccept
list.description: teamAccept - handles the TeamAccept event

list.title: module.exports#handlers.teamTalk
list.description: teamTalk - Handles the TeamTalk event

list.title: module.exports#handlers.timeOver
list.description: timeOver - Handles the TimeOver event

list.title: module.exports#handlers.timetrack
list.description: timetrack - handles the 'timetrack' events
